problem_text_cn: 1428 (1) 写出液滴模型下核结合能半经验公式（魏扎克公式），指出各项物理意义及量子效应项；(2) 镜核$^{11}_5\text{B}$和$^{11}_6\text{C}$的原子质量分别为$11.00931\ \mathrm{u}$和$11.01143\ \mathrm{u}$，用结合能公式求核半径公式$R = r_0A^{1/3}$中的$r_0$。已知：$M(^1\text{H}) = 1.007825\ \mathrm{u}$，$m_n = 1.008665\ \mathrm{u}$，$e^2/(4\pi\varepsilon_0) = 1.44\ \mathrm{MeV \cdot fm}$，$1\ \mathrm{u}c^2 = 931.5\ \mathrm{MeV}$。
problem_text_en: 1428 (1) Write semi-empirical mass formula (Weizsäcker formula) for nuclear binding energy, explain each term and quantum terms; (2) Mirror nuclei $^{11}_5\text{B}$ and $^{11}_6\text{C}$ have masses $11.00931\ \mathrm{u}$ and $11.01143\ \mathrm{u}$. Use binding energy formula to find $r_0$ in $R = r_0A^{1/3}$. Given: $M(^1\text{H}) = 1.007825\ \mathrm{u}$, $m_n = 1.008665\ \mathrm{u}$, $e^2/(4\pi\varepsilon_0) = 1.44\ \mathrm{MeV \cdot fm}$, $1\ \mathrm{u}c^2 = 931.5\ \mathrm{MeV}$.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 魏扎克公式：$B(Z,A) = a_VA - a_sA^{2/3} - a_cZ^2/A^{1/3} - a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A} + B_P$，其中$B_P$（对能）和对称能$a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A}$为量子效应项；(2) 镜核质量差由库仑能差决定，$\Delta M c^2 = (M(^1\text{H}) - m_n)c^2 + \frac{3}{5}\frac{Z_2(Z_2-1) - Z_1(Z_1-1)}{r_0A^{1/3}} \cdot \frac{e^2}{4\pi\varepsilon_0}$，解得$r_0 = 1.41\ \mathrm{fm}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Weizsäcker formula: $B(Z,A) = a_VA - a_sA^{2/3} - a_cZ^2/A^{1/3} - a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A} + B_P$, where $B_P$ (pairing) and symmetry energy $a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A}$ are quantum terms; (2) Mirror nucleus mass difference comes from Coulomb energy difference, $\Delta M c^2 = (M(^1\text{H}) - m_n)c^2 + \frac{3}{5}\frac{Z_2(Z_2-1) - Z_1(Z_1-1)}{r_0A^{1/3}} \cdot \frac{e^2}{4\pi\varepsilon_0}$, solve for $r_0 = 1.41\ \mathrm{fm}$.
problem_answer: (1) 魏扎克公式：$\boldsymbol{B(Z,A) = a_VA - a_sA^{2/3} - a_cZ^2/A^{1/3} - a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A} + B_P}$，其中$\boldsymbol{a_VA}$为体积能，$\boldsymbol{a_sA^{2/3}}$为表面能，$\boldsymbol{a_cZ^2/A^{1/3}}$为库仑能，$\boldsymbol{a_a\frac{(N-Z)^2}{A}}$为对称能（量子），$\boldsymbol{B_P}$为对能（量子）；(2) $\boldsymbol{r_0 = 1.41\ \mathrm{fm}}$。
